description: You are a store manager at Urban Electronics. A customer, John Doe (username: johndoe, uid=2), needs his existing draft order updated. Add the product 'Logitech MX Master 3S' (SKU: LOGI-MXM3S) to the order and update the billing information to John Doe, 789 Oak Avenue, Chicago, Illinois (IL), 60601. Complete the order by transitioning it from Draft to the fulfillment stage. The site is located at http://localhost and you are logged in as admin.
